items.title: Bitcoin is at ‘pivotal level’ as $65K downside risk looms: Analyst
items.summary: While Bitcoin is hovering around $73,000, a crypto trader says the current setup is “different from the previous breakdown in February.”

items.title: Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger
items.summary: Andrew Gault, the venture capitalist who funded the quantum hardware labs now threatening bitcoin, says the industry is looking in the wrong place. Google's own security team moved in the same direction in March.

items.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
items.summary: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.

items.title: Bitcoin underperforms risk assets as record 9th day of ETF outflows signal waning demand
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 29, 2026

items.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
items.summary: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

items.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
items.summary: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

items.title: XRP Ledger's new proposal blocks the flash loan attacks costing DeFi hundreds of millions
items.summary: A draft XRPL amendment notes that flash loan attacks are "structurally impossible" on the network because of how its transactions are built, an architectural quirk that has spared the chain from the exploit class that has cost Ethereum DeFi billions.

items.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
items.summary: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.

items.title: Bitcoin dip buyers curb selling but questionable spot, futures volumes highlight weakness
items.summary: Bitcoin dip buyers are present near range lows, and new leveraged longs opened in the zone but the volumes lack the size needed to reverse the downtrend.

items.title: SEC sues Texas man over $12.3 million alleged crypto scheme built on fake AI trading bots
items.summary: Fuller allegedly diverted $6.2 million for personal use and $5.5M for Ponzi-like payments; only 3% of funds went to crypto trading.

items.title: U.S. says it seized about $1 billion in Iranian crypto as pressure campaign expands
items.summary: The seizure, falling under "Operation Economic Fury," aims to restrict Iran's access to overseas revenue, banking networks, and crypto infrastructure.

items.title: Wall Street’s trillion-dollar dilemma: Why AI-powered hackers are keeping big banks off the blockchain
items.summary: CertiK CEO and co-founder Ronghui Gu says April was the worst month for DeFi in four years with exploits on 27 out of 30 days.

items.title: When the market is bad, we build: Inside Binance’s bold 2030 master plan
items.summary: Established crypto firms will merge with traditional finance, but neither Wall Street bankers nor corporate giants will take over the crypto industry, said Binance’s Head of VIP and Institutional, Catherine Chen.

items.title: Hyperliquid could become a ‘financial services juggernaut’ as DeFi expands, says Grayscale
items.summary: The digital asset manager says Hyperliquid is emerging as a blockchain-based financial infrastructure platform with the potential to expand beyond crypto trading and challenge parts of traditional derivatives and exchange markets.

items.title: XRP ETFs add $35 million as bitcoin and ether funds lost $2 billion in late May
items.summary: From May 20 to May 29, XRP funds took in $35 million while bitcoin and ether ETFs lost roughly $2 billion combined, with Ripple’s earlier reported XRP treasury plan still awaiting confirmation.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, XRP, dogecoin lag a nine-week stocks rally as ETF demand cools
items.summary: The S&P 500 posted its longest weekly winning streak since 2023 and Brent oil stabilized near $92 on US-Iran ceasefire hopes. The biggest cryptocurrencies still drifted lower, with Hyperliquid's HYPE the only major name to rally.

items.title: Senator Lummis says China will 'write the rules' of the new financial era if CLARITY fails
items.summary: The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance the CLARITY Act in May, but it must still pass both chambers of Congress before heading to the president's desk.

items.title: Circle freezes $12.6M of USDC linked to privacy protocol Zama
items.summary: The $12.6 million in USDC was likely frozen in connection with an ongoing but unrelated civil court case, according to onchain sleuth ZachXBT.

items.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots
items.summary: The SEC charged Texas man Nathan Fuller with raising $12.3 million from 150 investors through a crypto fraud scheme built around fake AI trading bots.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
